title: Federal Reserve Board - 2026 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This page is a Federal Reserve listing/index page for 2026 FOMC press releases, not the actual policy statements themselves. It references four press releases dated 3/18/2026 (FOMC statement and economic projections) and 1/28/2026 (FOMC statement and longer-run goals reaffirmation). The actual monetary policy content from these meetings is not present in this source.
key_points: This is a container/listing page referencing multiple FOMC press releases, not the full policy statements
Press release dated 3/18/2026: FOMC statement issued
Press release dated 3/18/2026: Economic projections released from March 17-18 FOMC meeting
Press release dated 1/28/2026: FOMC statement issued
Press release dated 1/28/2026: FOMC reaffirmed Statement on Longer-Run Goals and Monetary Policy Strategy
Source word count is only 218 words, indicating thin content
why_it_matters: The page does not contain the actual FOMC policy statements or economic projections. It only confirms that FOMC meetings occurred on March 17-18, 2026 and January 28, 2026, and that statements were issued. Actual policy decisions, rate targets, and economic projections are not included in this source.
macro_context: The source indicates FOMC meetings occurred in January and March 2026, but provides no policy details.
notes: This source is a thin listing page that confirms FOMC meetings occurred in January and March 2026 but contains no substantive policy content. The extraction_warning flag confirms main_content_fallback was used, suggesting actual statement text was not captured. For proper macro catalyst research, the individual FOMC statements linked from this page would need to be archived separately. This page has minimal archival value on its own.
